properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v2 v3 v3 v2 v2 v3 v3 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All other gods They are the works of man But you are the Most High God There's none like You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jehovah you are the most high! You are the most high God Jehovah, you are the most high! You are the most high God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are good and your mercy is forever, Hallelujah! You are good and your mercy is forever, Hallelujah!
